import React, { useState } from "react"; import "./AccountInfo.css"; const AccountInfo = ({ onGoBack }) => { const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ firstName: "Sundar", lastName: "Gurung", email: "sundargurung360@gmail.com", contactNumber: "", position: "", }); const handleChange = (e) => { const { name, value } = e.target; setFormData((prev) => ({ ...prev, [name]: value })); }; return (
{/* Header Section */}
Account Information
{/* Profile Summary Section */}

{`${formData.firstName} ${formData.lastName}`}

{formData.email}

{/* Form Section */}
e.preventDefault()}>
); }; export default AccountInfo;
